name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Exam Oracle.
title: '[feat] '

---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that you can't today? Be specific.

## The idea

Describe what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or other ways this could be implemented.

## Priority

How much does this hurt / help? (low / medium / high)

## Anything else?

Mockups, related issues, links — anything helpful.
